jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aptech - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
